  • For all things Apple — products, accessories, apps, games, music, movies, TV shows, iCloud+ and more.
  • Perfect for App Store purchases and subscriptions — get apps, games, music, movies, TV shows and more.
  • The perfect gift to say happy birthday, thank you, congratulations and more.
  • Card delivered via email.
  • Use it for purchases at any Apple Store location, on the Apple Store app, apple.com, the App Store, iTunes, Apple Music, Apple TV, Apple News+, Apple Books, Apple Arcade, iCloud+, Fitness+, Apple One and other Apple properties in the UK only
  • To purchase products at the Apple Store, bring this email to any Apple Store location. For online purchases, go to apple.com/redeem to add to your Apple Account Balance.
  • Not valid for other payments.
  • No returns or refunds on Apple Gift Cards. Terms apply.

Product description

Product Description

Use the Apple Gift Card to get products, accessories, apps, games, music, movies, TV shows and more. Spend it at any Apple Store location, in the App Store, or on subscriptions like music, iCloud+ and more.

Legal Disclaimer

Beware of gift card scams. Do not share your code. Valid only for UK transactions in Apple properties. For assistance, visit support.apple.com/giftcard. 1 Not redeemable at Apple resellers or for cash, and no resale, refunds or exchanges, except as required by law. Apple is not responsible for unauthorised use. Terms apply, see apple.com/uk/go/legal/gc. 2 Issued by Apple Distribution International Ltd. (ADIL). No expiry. © 2026 Apple Distribution International Ltd. All rights

How customer reviews and ratings work

Customer Reviews, including Product Star Ratings, help customers to learn more about the product and decide whether it is the right product for them.

To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyses reviews to verify trustworthiness.

Learn more how customers reviews work on Amazon

Customers say

Customers find the gift card useful, particularly for birthdays, and appreciate its ease of use, with one mentioning it's simple for grandkids to use. The card is quick and fast, and customers like that it's easy to send as a gift. However, the functionality and code availability receive negative feedback, with many reporting that the cards don't work and there are no codes provided. Moreover, customers express concerns about authenticity, with several describing it as a scam, and value for money is mixed, with some finding it great value while others consider it a waste of money.

Amazon Customer
5 out of 5 stars
Apple gift card
Welcome to "Roving Reviews" Varying price Apple gift card Hello welcome back! So buying gift cards 🤔 is it a cop out? Save you going to the shops?? Well yes right on both counts and guilty as charged. But there is always a "but" its so easy isn't it ? A variety of cards, email cards physical cards. If you can't actually think 🤔 what to buy then going down this route is the way to go!

Top reviews from United Kingdom

  • Max Hall
    5.0 out of 5 stars It does not open
    Reviewed in the United Kingdom on 19 February 2026
    Denomination: 50Design Name: 1Verified Purchase
    Ashley
    5.0 out of 5 stars Simple, easy and does what it says
    Reviewed in the United Kingdom on 12 January 2026
    Denomination: 10Design Name: 2Verified Purchase
    This Apple gift card does exactly what it says on the tin. It was easy to buy and straightforward to redeem with no fuss at all.

    The email delivery came quickly and the instructions were clear, so there was no guessing about how to add the balance to an Apple account. For app purchases, it worked perfectly.

    Overall, very simple and exactly what I needed.
    Read more
    Helpful
     Report
  • Dazz
    1.0 out of 5 stars NEVER BUY THESE FROM AMAZON!
    Reviewed in the United Kingdom on 14 January 2025
    Denomination: 10Design Name: 3Verified Purchase
    I sent a card as a gift to a friend. He received the email fairly quickly. When he clicked within the email to get the card he was taken to another Amazon partner site that showed a clickable code. Clicking the code returned a site error page at Apple. After a few attempts he tried redeeming the code within the Apple app store, but this told him the code had already been used. I spoke to Amazon Customer Support via chat who passed me around and said the card had been delivered (obviously or he wouldn't have been able to use it at all) and that it had not yet been redeemed. At this point I was told there was nothing they could do, I needed to speak to Apple and cut me off! Amazon don't give an invoice for this or a gift card serial number. Now I have to wait for up to 3 days for Apple to investigate and try to get a refund. I'm on a limited disability income and cannot afford to have this amount held in limbo. I've had to make other arrangements for my friend. Lessons learned:
    1) Don't buy Apple Gift Cards from Amazon!
    2) Customer Support couldn't care less - not my problem
    After equally poor service from Apple and waiting 7 days, they said they had NO RECORDS regarding the card serial number I prised from Amazon Customer services, but which isn't in the Order Details or contained in the delivering email. Apple told me they could not refund me because I did not buy the card from them. They said Amazon must refund me. Contacted Amazon again and two levels of staff said they couldn't. Registered formal complaint and escalation. I had tried another card the day after the first one which also failed. Now I am £200 down. One I then got from Argos worked perfectly fine!
    Amazon site and service is not what it once was. Deliveries get worse. Costs more, getting less. A Disaster.
    Read more
    50 people found this helpful
